notes: Per-sport stats provider routing. NBA migrated to API-Sports (Pro plan, 7500/day) on 2026-05-08 — verified end-to-end against the 2025-26 season. NFL/MLB/NHL adapters not yet wired in apisportsAdapter.ts (they throw 'not yet wired'); leave those on espn until ported. Valid providers: espn, thesportsdb, apisports.
